Class-Druid 20 — Female Human Druid: 20
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 9 (-1) Intelligence: 19 (+4) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 18 (+4)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Evil
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Constitution: 1; Intelligence: 3 Experience: 936730/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Spell Recall: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Ability Boosts: 6 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Druid (Druid Subclass); Druid (Elemental Fury); Druid (Primal Order)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Boon Of Spell Recall; Defense; Great Weapon Fighting; Magic Initiate (Wizard); Skilled; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Druid Features: Archdruid; Armor Training (Light; Shield); Beast Spells; Circle Of The Land Spells; Circle Of The Land; Druid Subclass; Druidic; Elemental Fury; Epic Boon; Improved Elemental Fury; Land's Aid; Magician; Natural Recovery; Nature's Sanctuary; Nature's Ward; Potent Spellcasting; Primal Order; Primal Strike; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Animal Handling, Arcana, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, Survival); Spellcasting; Tool Proficiency (Herbalism Kit); Warden; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons); Wild Companion; Wild Resurgence; Wild Shape Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Archdruid: Has the Evergreen Wild Shape, Nature Magician, and Longevity features
Druid Subclass: 1 selection
Elemental Fury: 1 selection
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Primal Order: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Longevity: Ages at 1/10 normal rate
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Athletics; Deception; Insight; Nature; Religion; Sleight Of Hand
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +9 Performance: (cha) +4
Animal Handling: (wis) +9 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +7 Investigation: (int) +4 Religion: (int) +10
Athletics: (str) +6 Medicine: (wis) +3 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +8
Deception: (cha) +10 Nature: (int) +13 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +4 Perception: (wis) +3 Survival: (wis) +3
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Herbalism Kit: (int)
Skill Notes:
Magician: +3 Arcana/+3 Nature
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Druidic: Speaks a secret language known only by druids
Combat
Hit Points: 47 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Dart (+8 1d4+2 P R20/60; Vex); Mace (+6 1d6 B; Sap); Sling (+8 1d4+2 B R30/120; Slow); Unarmed (+6 1 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: -20
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Improved Elemental Fury: Has increased Primal Strike effects
Warden: Armor Training (Medium)/Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)
Evergreen Wild Shape: Has at least 1 use of Wild Shape available after initiative
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Primal Strike: Weapon or natural attacks inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of cold, fire, lightning, or thunder once per turn
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +4; Constitution: -1; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +10; Strength: +0; Wisdom: +9
Save Notes: Nature's Ward: Has immunity to poisoned and resistance to fire, cold, lightning, or poison depending on whether Circle Spells are currently taken from Arid, Polar, Temperate, or Tropical Land
Magic
Spell Slots: D0: 5; D1: 4; D2: 3; D3: 3; D4: 3; D5: 3; D6: 2; D7: 2; D8: 1; D9: 1 Attack: C: +9; D: +9; W: +10 Spell DC: C: 17; D: 17; W: 18
Spells:
Acid Splash (Tropical Land0 [Tropical Land] Evoc): R60' Inflicts 4d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Antipathy/Sympathy (D8 Ench): R60' Target creature or object charms or frightens a specified creature type within 120' (save Wisdom negates; additional saves when no longer within 120' end and give immunity for 1 min) for 10 days
Blight (Arid Land4 [Arid Land] Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target automatically fails) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blur (Arid Land2 [Arid Land] Illu): Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
Burning Hands (Arid Land1 [Arid Land] Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Commune With Nature (D5 Divi): Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Cone Of Cold (Polar Land5 [Polar Land] Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Conjure Animals (D3 Conj): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d10 HP slashing (save Dexterity negates), and 5' radius gives self advantage on Strength saves, for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Conjure Minor Elementals (D4 Conj): Self attacks within 15' inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, or lightning for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Cure Wounds (D1 Evoc): 1
Find Familiar (D1 [Wild Companion] Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Find Traps (D2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Fire Bolt (Arid Land0 [Arid Land] Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fireball (Arid Land3 [Arid Land] Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Fog Cloud (Polar Land1 [Polar Land] Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Freedom Of Movement (Temperate Land4 [Temperate Land] Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Guidance (D0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Heal (D6 Evoc): 1
Hold Person (Polar Land2 [Polar Land] Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Ice Storm (Polar Land4 [Polar Land] Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning]
Insect Plague (Tropical Land5 [Tropical Land] Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Lesser Restoration (D2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lightning Bolt (Temperate Land3 [Temperate Land] Evoc): 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Locate Creature (D4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Mending (D0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1'
Misty Step (Temperate Land2 [Temperate Land] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Move Earth (D6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Plane Shift (D7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plant Growth (D3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a 1/2 mile radius for 365 days
Polymorph (D4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 HP
Polymorph (Tropical Land4 [Tropical Land] Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 HP
Produce Flame (D0 Conj): Lights a 10' radius for 10 min; can be used for a ranged spell attack that inflicts 4d8 HP and ends the spell
Protection From Energy (D3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Poison (D2 Abju): Touched recovers from poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Purify Food And Drink (D1 Tran): R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Ray Of Frost (Polar Land0 [Polar Land] Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (Tropical Land1 [Tropical Land] Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Reincarnate (D5 Tran): 1
Reverse Gravity (D7 Tran): R100' Items in a 50' radius fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Scrying (D5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): Held club gains +9 attacks and inflicts 2d6+3 HP of a choice of force or weapon damage for 1 min
Shocking Grasp (Temperate Land0 [Temperate Land] Evoc): Touched suffers 4d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until its next turn
Sleep (Temperate Land1 [Temperate Land] Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking wakens)
Sleet Storm (Polar Land3 [Polar Land] Conj): R150' 40' radius douses flames and inflicts difficult terrain and falling prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Speak With Animals (D1 Divi): Self can talk with animals for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (R1 [Druidic] Divi): Self can talk with animals for 10 min [R]
Stinking Cloud (Tropical Land3 [Tropical Land] Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Storm Of Vengeance (D9 Conj): 300' radius within 1 mile inflicts 2d6 HP thunder and deafness (save Constitution negates), then 4d6 HP acid, then 10d6 HP lightning (6 targets; save Dexterity half), then 2d6 HP bludgeoning, then 1d6 cold per rd and no ranged attacks for concentration up to 1 min
Thunderwave (D1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Tree Stride (Temperate Land5 [Temperate Land] Conj): Allows self to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Wall Of Stone (Arid Land5 [Arid Land] Evoc): R120' Creates 10 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels, with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Web (Tropical Land2 [Tropical Land] Conj): R60' 20' cube restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates and Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Magic Notes:
Circle Of The Land Spells: Has the Arid Land, Polar Land, Temperate Land, and Tropical Land features
Magician: Knows +1 Druid cantrip
Beast Spells: Can cast spells during Wild Shape
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Circle Of The Land Spells: Can choose spells from 1 type of land to have prepared after a long rest
Druidic: Knows the Speak With Animals spell
Improved Elemental Fury: Cantrips with a range of 10' or more can be cast at 300'
Land's Aid: R60' Can expend a Wild Shape use to inflict 4d6 HP necrotic to targets in a 10' radius; an additional target regains an equal number of hit points
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Natural Recovery: Can cast 1 Druid spell without using a spell slot and recover 10 spell slot levels (level 5 maximum) during a short rest once per long rest
Nature Magician: Can convert Wild Shape uses into a spell slot, expending a use for each 2 spell levels, once per long rest
Nature's Sanctuary: R120' Creates a 15' cube of spectral vines and trees that can move 60' as a bonus action, gives allies Nature's Ward resistance, and gives self and allies half cover, for 1 min
Potent Spellcasting: Druid cantrips inflict +3 HP
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the druid spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Wild Companion: Can expend a spell slot or a use of Wild Shape to summon a Fey familiar using Find Familiar; the familiar remains present until the next long rest
Wild Resurgence: Can expend a Wild Shape use to gain a level 1 spell slot once per long rest and expend a spell slot to gain a Wild Shape use
Wild Shape: Can transform into a CR 1 creature with 20 temporary hit points for 10 hr 4 times per long rest; a short rest restores 1 use
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 3 available vs. 5 allocated
